title: aspidium noveboracense
intro: Aspidium noveboracense, also known as Eastern Lady Fern, is a type of deciduous fern native to eastern North America. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly its ability to reduce inflammation and aid in digestion. The health benefits of Aspidium noveboracense include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Aspidium noveboracense often include teas, infusions, and tinctures that are used to treat a variety of ailments, although its use should be cautioned and used under medical supervision.
